title: Enyo's Altar's
description: An altar plugin that makes altars, summoning, and custom item distribution on smps fun and engaging, exact plugin used for mythos smp.
body:
This plugin is made for SMP and mainly smp content, with special VFX and made to work with custom items, so can be used almost like an API for a custom item server.

How to use:

First place down your altar block, I would reccomend a lodestone though it can be anything.

Hold your weapon of choice for the altar, and have the crafting materials in your inventory ready.

Do /altar set, It will use the item your holding to make the altar, and open an inventory, that inventory is the crafting recipe, put in the materials needed to craft the weapon from the altar, and your done!

If you ever want to edit the recipe, look at the altar and do /altar recipe, it will open the gui and let you change it around.

Make as many altars as you want, there is no limit to how many can run at one time.

If you ever wish to delete the altar, look at it and do /altar clear

If you ever wish to remove all altars in the server, do /altar clearall

Enjoy!
